title: oldenlandia lactea
intro: Oldenlandia lactea, also known as Hong Jing Tian in traditional Chinese medicine, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties, making it useful in the treatment of various ailments. It has been traditionally used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Oldenlandia lactea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, making it a versatile and widely used medicinal plant in traditional Asian medicine.
